_notes: ASEAN full members as of May 2026: 10 Southeast Asian states. Timor-Leste was accepted in principle in 2022 and is on a roadmap to full membership but has not yet formally joined; it is NOT included here.
name: Association of Southeast Asian Nations
mission: Regional intergovernmental organization of ten Southeast Asian states, fostering economic integration, political dialogue, security cooperation, and cultural exchange in the region.
